metaDesc: World Protocol Academy privacy information, data handling principles and contact route for privacy-related questions.
title: Privacy Policy
deck: General privacy information for the WPA digital platform.
k001: This page provides general privacy information for the WPA digital platform. It is not a substitute for formal legal advice.
k003: WPA may receive data you voluntarily send — for example your name and email address when you contact us, submit a paper, a question or a correction request.
k005: Data is used only to respond to your message, process your request and maintain the communication related to it. WPA does not sell personal data.
k007: When you contact us by email, your message and address are kept within the email communication so that we can reply.
k009: Materials you send for review are used only for editorial assessment and the communication related to it.
k010: Cookies and GitHub Pages / third-party hosting
k011: The site is hosted on GitHub Pages. WPA does not set its own tracking cookies. The hosting provider may process technical data (for example IP addresses in server logs) under its own terms.
k013: If analytics is used, it serves only to understand general site usage in aggregate, with no sale of personal data.
k015: Data is kept only for as long as needed for the purpose for which it was collected. You may request deletion of your contact data.
k017: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of the data you provided to us. For corrections to published materials, see the correction request page.
